title: KV Policy — Per-head RL KV Eviction
summary_zh: 將 KV cache 驅逐重構為 RL ranking 問題，每個 attention head 訓練獨立的輕量級 agent。Per-head 專業化適應不同的注意力模式——部分 head 追蹤近期性、部分追蹤實體引用。
summary_en: Reformulates KV cache eviction as an RL ranking problem, training independent lightweight agents per attention head. Per-head specialization adapts to different attention patterns -- some heads track recency, others track entity references.
